texto: I’ve got this thing I do when my mind starts to spiral before a fight. I unfold my fingers and concentrate on them one by one until my feelings narrow into focused calm. I associate each finger with a specific phrase, and if I have time, I recite them to myself like mantras.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Elliott James: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I’ve got this thing I do when my mind starts to spiral before a fight. I unfold my fingers and co…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, meditation, thing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

texto: I’ve got this thing I do when my mind starts to spiral before a fight. I unfold my fingers and concentrate on them one by one until my feelings narrow into focused calm. Pinky: I've been in this kind of situation before. Fourth finger: I've felt these feelings before. Middle finger: I've survived them every time. Index finger: Everybody dies eventually. Thumb: That includes my enemies.
explicacao: Citação de Elliott James sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “I’ve got this thing I do when my mind starts to spiral before a fight. I unfold my fingers and co…” articula humor, funny, meditation em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como meditation.
